name: Kaeya  Alberich
description: __Origin:__ Mondstadt __Constellation:__ Pavo Ocellus Kaeya is an adopted son to the Ragnvindr Family, the renowned tycoon in winery. It has been a long time since he last called Diluc Ragnvindr "brother". Kaeya currently serves as the Cavalry Captain of the Knights of Favonius, trusted by Jean. Kaeya is often the one cleaning or wrapping things up in every incident that occurred in the vicinity of Mondstadt.

name: Maki Katsuragi
description: A transfer student, as well as a part-time worker, and the son of Aya Katsuragi and the latter’s ex-husband, Kenji Kyobate. Despite having no past experience in soft tennis, he joins the Shijo Minami Junior High boys’ soft tennis club and is quickly discovered to have a natural talent for the sport. He plays as the front player with Toma Shinjo as his partner. (Source: Stars Align Wiki)

name: Mammon
description: Mammon is the Avatar of Greed and is the second oldest of the seven demon brothers.

name: Futaba Igarashi
description: Igarashi is a short young adult woman of a relatively slender build and is often confused for a child. Because of this, she gets treated like one which annoys her. She usually has her shoulder-length green hair tied in a ponytail and forest green eyes. She can be seen in a suit in the office area. From the moment she met her senpai Takeda, she gradually gets annoyed at everything he does and says. description: Gobta is a hobgoblin and is one of Rimuru Tempest's followers. Though he seems to be air-headed he tends to be a hard-worker and dependable when the time calls for it.

While she comes off as a cold fighter when she's on the battlefield, Aliceliese isn't much different from a normal girl her age. name: Yushirou
description: __Height:__ 157 cm (5'2") Yushiro is a traveling companion of Tamayo and close ally of Kamado Tanjirou. He was turned into a Demon by Tamayo. Yushiro was a human who was under the care of Tamayo as she was practicing as a medical practitioner. He was in the frail state fighting disease when Tamayo gave him the choice of succumbing to his illness or to live longer as a Demon. He agreed to become a Demon and has since stayed by Tamayo's side serving as an assistant as well as her guard. ~!Yushiro

name: Katsuya Jonouchi
description: Jonouchi is [Yugi](https://anilist.co/character/1374)'s best friend. At the beginning Jonouchi used to bully Yugi but after being saved by Yugi from an even more of a dangerous thug, Jonouchi has been pals with Yugi ever since. Jonouchi likes to hang around with Yugi and learns a lot of new games. He's not always confident that he'll win his games but he always tries his best. He enters the Duelist Kingdom Tournament to get money for his sister, [Shizuka](https://anilist.co/character/5989), who

name: Fable
description: A mysterious man labelled as the "Genius of Killing". With his favourite gun, Night Hawk, in his hands, he's a hitman that can take down any enemy in a single shot. His origins and real name are both unknown. Seems to very much love watching the comedian, Jackal Tomioka. An individual that you should be wary of and pay attention to!

name: Lan Fan
description: Lan Fan is one of two bodyguards of Ling Yao and the granddaughter of Ling's other bodyguard, Fu. She is very quiet and cares deeply for Ling. As a result, she is constantly thinking of his safety and often forgets her own. Lan Fan is a very skilled fighter and is able to sense the presence of a soul (referred to as chi); thus she can quickly identify Homunculi like Envy that have more than one soul in their Philosopher's Stones (meaning she can easily see through Envy's disguises). Although we

name: Roxana Agriche
description: The name Roxana means "bright, sun, sunlight, sun god, day, dawn". She was named by her father. Roxana Agriche is the main character of the Roxana series. She is the daughter of Lante Agriche and Sierra Agriche, and the biological younger sister of Achille Agriche. Roxana is a very cunning individual who has developed the ability to manipulate or deceive others in order to survive or obtain what she wants. description: Retired member of the Demon Slayer Corps, previously holding the title of Water Hashira. He is the main cultivator of the Water Breathing style, having trained Makomo, Sabito, Giyu Tomioka, and Tanjiro Kamado.

description: __Height:__ 163 cm A half-Japanese third-year girl whose Italian-American father manages a chain of Italian-style hotels. She has a bright personality and moves at her own pace.

name: Yoshitake Shiraishi
description: One of the Abashiri Convicts who travels with Sugimoto's Group. Shiraishi is carefree and goofy, and prefers to sneak his way out of trouble. He is also rather immature. Most of the time, Shiraishi lacks seriousness and prefers to spend time on frivolous pursuits like gambling or eating rather than looking for the gold. He also likes pretty women; his backstory involves him searching for a woman he fell in love with through a sloppy drawing. Shiraishi has a roguish personality. Because he lacks

name: Mutsumi Wakaba
description: __Height:__ 153 cm (5'0") A first-year high school student. Mutsumi used to be a member of the band CRYCHIC, where she was in charge of the guitar. She is very stoic and a taciturn. Her father is a famous comedian called Wakaba, and her mother is Mori Minami, an actress. One of her hobbies is ballet.

name: Shinra Kishitani
description: __Height:__ 178 cm A young underground doctor who lives with Celty and is also her lover. He mostly remains indoors and wears his white doctor's coat even when he is not at work. He went to the same primary school as Shizuo and Izaya and finds them interesting, enjoying their fights ... up to a point. name: Seishuu Inui
description: __Height:__ 177 cm Former tenth generation Black Dragons commander and the current vice captain of the Black Dragons. Inupi is usually a stoic and quiet individual. However, he isn't afraid to voice his thoughts and opinions even if it hurts him in the end. He is very committed to the Black Dragon and loyal to Kokonoi, whom he considers his best friend. When he finds people he trusts, he devotes himself to them. He is brave, but will be willing to show his vulnerable side and open up.

name: Anne Shirley
description: Anne is a very talkative little girl, who is always talking to everyone and she even likes to talk alone. She likes to give "poetic" names to things she likes, and has a huge imagination. Anne is a real tomboy and deeply dislikes her red hair. Very warm hearted, she´s a loyal friend and daughter, captivating everyone around her with her originality.
